steps.title: Identify what the student needs
steps.content: The student claims people have mixed feelings about cultured meat — both positive and negative attitudes — that may slow adoption. The supporting evidence must show this internal contradiction.

steps.title: Find the quote with both sides
steps.content:
B is about the flavor of conventional meat. C is one-sidedly positive. D is about packaging.

A shows exactly the mixed-feelings tension: consumers think cultured meat would be good for the environment (positive) yet few are willing to try eating it (negative). A is correct.
